creator: vwe@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback


Alexander, 
do you mind to give us some information about your problem as a starting point 
to further inspect your problem? 
Please provide us with the output of the slice layout of your device (fdisk), 
also tell us about the filesystem on that device (ufs/msdosfs/ntfs/...), 
also please show us your mount options and check if you're using userland 
tools like fuse or the like. 
If ufs is involved, please check dumpfs. Have you fsck'ed your filesystem? 
Even it might not hurt to see output of dmesg or better, boot verbose dmesg.
